Daily_Observances.name: Ashtami Vrata
Daily_Observances.benefit: Strength to overcome enemies and internal fear

trayodashi_hasta_magha.description: Trayodashi tithi with Sun in Hasta and Moon in Magha

amavasya_hasta_magha.description: Amavasya tithi with Sun in Hasta and Moon in Magha

pitru_paksha_bhadrapada_krishna_trayodas.description: Bhadrapada Krishna Trayodashi / Pitru Paksha with Sun in Hasta and Moon in Magha

Disha_Shool.guidance: Avoid travel in the indicated direction if possible.
remedies: Consume or carry jaggery, curd, or barley before travel.
Begin travel in an auspicious muhurta if direction cannot be changed.
Offer prayer to Ganesha or Ishta Devata before departure.

Rahu_Vaasa.guidance: Rahu is considered to reside in the indicated direction for this weekday.

Brahma_Muhurta.source: Ashtanga Hridaya Sutrasthana 2:1, Charaka Samhita, Manu Smriti 4.92
Brahma_Muhurta.significance: Most auspicious time for meditation, study, and spiritual practices. Sattvik period filled with purity, calmness, and clarity.

pradosha.significance: No Trayodashi overlap in Pradosha Kaal for this day.

brahma_muhurta.source: Ashtanga Hridaya Sutrasthana 2:1, Charaka Samhita, Manu Smriti 4.92
brahma_muhurta.significance: Most auspicious time for meditation, study, and spiritual practices. Sattvik period filled with purity, calmness, and clarity.

Pradosha_Kaal.significance: No Trayodashi overlap in Pradosha Kaal for this day.

Bhadra.impact_on_earth: Strictly Inauspicious — avoid all auspicious work

notes: No natal or person-specific inputs are used.
Evaluation is derived only from current Panchang and transit state for the configured location/time.
